mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID FROM STORES WHERE OWNER_USER_NO = #{ownerUserNo} AND STATUS = 'OPEN'
SELECT STORE_ID , STORE_NAME FROM STORES WHERE STATUS = 'OPEN'

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'OPEN' THEN 1 END) AS OPEN_STORE_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PAUSED' THEN 1 END) AS PAUSED_STORE_COUNT , COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'CLOSED' THEN 1 END) AS CLOSED_STORE_COUNT FROM STORES
